title: Mixed wind-light compensation water pumping and energy storing system and …
abstract: The invention provides a hybrid wind-solar hybrid pumped storage system, which includes a wind-solar hybrid unit, a controller, a DC load, an AC load, an inverter, and a pumped storage unit; the wind-solar hybrid unit includes a wind power generator set and a photovoltaic array; the pumped storage unit It includes a reversible water pump turbine unit, an upper pool and a lower pool; the controller includes a wind-solar hybrid controller, a digital signal processor chip, a voltage/current sampling circuit, a voltage/current transformer group, a circuit breaker drive circuit and three circuit breakers device. In the present invention, the traditional wind-solar hybrid system energy storage device—the storage battery pack is replaced by a pumped storage power generation system, and a reversible pump turbine is used in the pumped storage unit to pump water or generate electricity, and the segmental integration method is applied to the pumped storage unit. The pool performs energy monitoring and control. The invention solves the disadvantages of high price, short service life, environmental pollution and the like of the storage battery pack, improves system stability and power supply reliability, and reduces system construction and operation costs.

At present, energy conservation, emission reduction, green energy, and sustainable development have become the focus of attention of all countries. The ever-increasing price of fossil fuels, the increasingly prominent issue of the greenhouse effect, and the increasing demand for energy have made people's enthusiasm for research on new energy applications unprecedentedly high. Wind energy and solar energy resources have been favored by many researchers as a clean and efficient renewable energy. However, wind energy and solar energy resources also have the characteristics of instability and discontinuity. The emergence of wind and solar hybrid systems has solved this shortcoming of wind and solar resources to a certain extent. At the same time, the application of storage devices in wind and solar hybrid systems has further improved Increased system stability. In the wind-solar hybrid system, the traditional electric energy storage and transposition mostly use battery packs, but the battery packs have the characteristics of high cost, short life, difficult maintenance, and possible acid leakage of the battery, which may cause environmental pollution, which increases the operating cost of the system and affects system reliability.

The hybrid wind-solar hybrid pumped storage system of the present invention includes a wind-solar hybrid unit, a controller, a DC load, an AC load, an inverter and a pumped storage unit, wherein the wind-solar hybrid unit includes a wind power generator set and a photovoltaic array, and the pumped storage unit includes Reversible pump-turbine unit, upper and lower basins. The pump-turbine unit is placed between the upper and lower pools. When the pumped energy storage unit is in the power generation state, water is released from the upper pool to impact the pump-turbine unit, and the water flows into the lower pool. When pumping water, the pump-turbine unit pumps water from the lower pool to the upper pool. In the pumped energy storage unit, the device for pumping water from the upper pool and using the water in the upper pool to generate electricity adopts the same equipmentâreversible pump turbine; the reversible pump turbine set used in the pumped energy storage unit includes DC Reversible pump-turbine and AC reversible pump-turbine can use DC power supply to drive DC reversible pump-turbine to pump water, and can use AC power to drive AC reversible pump-turbine to pump water. DC reversible pump can be used for power generation The hydraulic turbine unit generates DC power to meet the DC load demand, and can use the AC reversible pump turbine to generate AC power to meet the AC load demand.

The controller includes a wind-solar complementary controller, a digital signal processor (DSP) chip, a voltage/current sampling circuit, a voltage/current transformer group, a circuit breaker driving circuit and three circuit breakers. The output terminals of the wind-solar hybrid controller are respectively connected to three circuit breakers. The control signal output by the DSP is connected to the three circuit breakers through the circuit breaker drive circuit to control the opening and closing of the circuit breakers. The DC load and AC load in the system use dual power supply mode to ensure the stability and reliability of the system.

The principle of maximum power tracking of photovoltaic cells is the process of seeking the optimal operating point of photovoltaic cells, that is, the optimal output voltage and output current, to obtain the maximum output power under different light and temperature conditions. The most commonly used maximum power tracking methods are constant voltage control method (Constant VoItage Tracking referred to as CVT), disturbance observation method (Perturbation and Ob servation Method referred to as P&O), admittance incremental method (Incremental conductance method referred to as IncCond) based on gradient variable step size Admittance incremental method, etc., and an algorithm that combines intelligent control algorithms, such as neural network, fuzzy control, particle swarm algorithm, etc. with the above methods.

Beneficial effects: the invention replaces the energy storage device in the traditional wind-solar hybrid systemâthe storage battery pack with a pumped storage power generation system, and uses a reversible pump turbine in the pumped storage unit for pumping water or generating electricity, and at the same time, applies the segmental integration method Energy monitoring and control is performed on the upper pool of the pumped storage unit. The invention solves the disadvantages of high price, short service life and possible environmental pollution caused by using the battery pack, improves the stability of the system and the reliability of power supply, and reduces the cost of system construction and operation.

The hybrid wind-solar hybrid pumped storage system of the present invention includes a wind-solar hybrid unit, a controller, a DC load, an AC load, an inverter, and a pumped-storage unit. For the array, the wind turbines use SN-1000W small wind turbines with a power of 1KW, and the number is 3; the photovoltaic array uses photovoltaic panels of the model STP260S-24/Vb, and the number of photovoltaic panels of this type is 6 , the photovoltaic panels are connected in a mixed way, that is, they are divided into 2 groups, each group has 3 panels, and the 3 photovoltaic panels in each group are connected in series, and then the 2 groups are connected in parallel;

The A0 terminal of the controller is connected to the output terminal of the wind turbine, the A1 terminal of the controller is connected to the output terminal of the photovoltaic array, and the A2 terminal, A3 terminal, and A4 terminal of the controller are respectively connected to the DC load, the DC reversible pump-turbine unit and the input of the inverter The A5 terminal of the controller is connected to the input terminal of the AC reversible pump-turbine for collecting the input voltage and current of the AC reversible pump-turbine set.
